channel.title: Comments for page "Baptism of the Wandering Jew by Johnny the Son"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Baptism of the Wandering Jew by Johnny the Son"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I have already said how much I adore Veronica. I don't think I need to restate that.

In every one of your stories you have an abundance of respect for the other contestant's OC. You figure out what makes them truly memorable and then you emulate that in your own work. I love it. I cant get enough.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I still think that you could cut at least another 3000 words from this and end up with something better, but what's there remains very good. Veronica is a well-developed character, and it will be interesting to see whether she ever gets much in the way of catharsis through this series!

item.title: Re: american post
item.content:encoded:
"i need to finish my oct tale"
- UraniumEmpire, except she said it a million times over the course of the last five days

item.title: american post
item.content:encoded:
Tied in a knot
But I'm not gonna get caught
Calling a pot kettle black
Every song's a comeback
Every moment's a little bit later

Thanks to psul for cutting this down by about 3k words! Thanks to Wilco for providing such great writing music! And thanks to me for finally finishing this!
